pr.title: [docs] Add workaround for system-reminder blocks leaking into WebFetch results (#61690)
pr.body:
## Summary

Documents the v2.1.150 regression where `<system-reminder>` blocks leak into `WebFetch` tool result content, and adds the downgrade workaround to the troubleshooting section.

Closes #61690

## Problem

In Claude Code v2.1.150, `<system-reminder>` blocks (TaskCreate/TaskUpdate nudges, tool-availability reminders) are appended to `WebFetch` tool_result content instead of being delivered as separate system messages. This is a routing regression from internal refactoring.

## Workaround

```bash
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.149
```

## The Fix Needed (CLI internal)

1. Flush reminder buffer to system-reminder slot **before** writing `tool_result.content` in deferred tool handlers
2. Add a destination-route assertion verifying reminders never land in tool_result payloads
pr.author: giruuuuj
